courses.title: Course 2
courses.description: Foundational math mastery organized by concept, with a local-first test and review workflow.

units.title: Ratios and Proportions
units.description: Reason about comparisons, unit rates, and proportional thinking.

concepts.title: Understanding Ratios
concepts.description: Interpret ratio language and simplify ratios in context.

concepts.title: Finding Unit Rates
concepts.description: Convert multi-unit comparisons into unit rates.

units.title: Integers and Number Sense
units.description: Build confidence with signed numbers and ordered values.

concepts.title: Integer Operations
concepts.description: Add, subtract, and compare integers with confidence.

concepts.title: Comparing Integers
concepts.description: Learn how to tell which integer is greater or less on a number line.
